title: PostHog/posthog
friendlyTitle: PostHog helps teams understand and improve AI products
summary: PostHog’s open-source product platform combines analytics, session replay, feature flags, experiments, error tracking and logs. Its project description now frames these signals as context for AI agents to diagnose issues, uncover opportunities and ship fixes.
friendlySummary: PostHog is an open-source tool for product analytics, experiments, error reports and recordings. It can give AI agents and developers more context about what is happening in a product.
whyItMatters: Teams can use PostHog to measure how people use an AI product, test changes safely and investigate failures with real product context. It is a practical foundation for keeping agent-assisted product work observable rather than magical and mysterious.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to see how people use your product and to test changes carefully. It can help teams find problems before an AI agent makes a bigger mess.
